---
title: "beta_diversity"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# Load in packages
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(vegan)
library(ggpubr)
library(microbiome)
library(indicspecies)
library(writexl)
library(ANCOMBC)
```

```{r}
ps = readRDS("../project_analyses/my_phyloseq_object.rds")
```

```{r}
# Rarify data
set.seed(123)
psrare = ps %>%
  rarefy_even_depth(sample.size = 10000, rngseed = 123)
```

```{r}
# Calculate Weighted Unifrac
set.seed(123)
ps_wunifrac = phyloseq::distance(psrare, method = "wunifrac")
```

```{r}
# Normalize and plot
set.seed(123)
mds = metaMDS(ps_wunifrac)

# Extract data
mds_data = mds$points %>% as.data.frame %>%
  merge(sample_data(psrare), by='row.names', sort=F)

# Plot it
p_wunifrac = mds_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1,MDS2,color = antidepressant_on_off)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_ellipse() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Antidepressant Use",
    values = c("off" = "#4876FF", "on" = "#FF82AB"),
    labels = c("off" = "Off", "on" = "On")) +
  labs(title = "Weighted Unifrac") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
p_wunifrac

ggsave("beta_diversity_plots/bdiv_wunifrac_plot.png", plot = p_wunifrac)
```

```{r}
# PERMANOVA
metadata2 = sample_data(psrare) %>% data.frame()

stats_univar = adonis2(ps_wunifrac ~ antidepressant_on_off, data = metadata2)

stats = bind_rows('Univariate' = stats_univar %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
                    rownames_to_column('Variable'),
                  .id = 'Model')

stats = stats %>% rename(Pval = `Pr(>F)`) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Pval))

stats
```

```{r}
# Bray-Curtis
set.seed(123)
ps_bray = phyloseq::distance(psrare, method = "bray")

mds = metaMDS(ps_bray)

# Extract data
mds_data = mds$points %>% as.data.frame %>%
  merge(sample_data(psrare), by='row.names', sort=F)

# Plot it
p_bray = mds_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1,MDS2,color = antidepressant_on_off)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_ellipse() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Antidepressant Use",
    values = c("off" = "#4876FF", "on" = "#FF82AB"),
    labels = c("off" = "Off", "on" = "On")) +
  labs(title = "Bray-Curtis") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
p_bray

ggsave("beta_diversity_plots/bdiv_bray_plot.png", plot = p_bray)

metadata2 = sample_data(psrare) %>% data.frame()

stats_univar = adonis2(ps_bray ~ antidepressant_on_off, data = metadata2)

stats = bind_rows('Univariate' = stats_univar %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
                    rownames_to_column('Variable'),
                  .id = 'Model')

stats = stats %>% rename(Pval = `Pr(>F)`) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Pval))

stats
```

```{r}
# Jaccard
set.seed(123)
ps_jaccard = phyloseq::distance(psrare, method = "jaccard")

mds = metaMDS(ps_jaccard)

# Extract data
mds_data = mds$points %>% as.data.frame %>%
  merge(sample_data(psrare), by='row.names', sort=F)

# Plot it
p_jaccard = mds_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1,MDS2,color = antidepressant_on_off)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_ellipse() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Antidepressant Use",
    values = c("off" = "#4876FF", "on" = "#FF82AB"),
    labels = c("off" = "Off", "on" = "On")) +
  labs(title = "Jaccard") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
p_jaccard

ggsave("beta_diversity_plots/bdiv_jaccard_plot.png", plot = p_jaccard)

metadata2 = sample_data(psrare) %>% data.frame()

stats_univar = adonis2(ps_jaccard ~ antidepressant_on_off, data = metadata2)

stats = bind_rows('Univariate' = stats_univar %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
                    rownames_to_column('Variable'),
                  .id = 'Model')

stats = stats %>% rename(Pval = `Pr(>F)`) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Pval))

stats
```

```{r}
# Unweighted Unifrac
set.seed(123)
ps_unifrac = phyloseq::distance(psrare, method = "unifrac")

mds = metaMDS(ps_unifrac)

# Extract data
mds_data = mds$points %>% as.data.frame %>%
  merge(sample_data(psrare), by='row.names', sort=F)

# Plot it
p_unifrac = mds_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1,MDS2,color = antidepressant_on_off)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.5) +
  stat_ellipse() +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Antidepressant Use",
    values = c("off" = "#4876FF", "on" = "#FF82AB"),
    labels = c("off" = "Off", "on" = "On")) +
  labs(title = "Unweighted Unifrac") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
p_unifrac

ggsave("beta_diversity_plots/bdiv_unifrac_plot.png", plot = p_unifrac)

metadata2 = sample_data(psrare) %>% data.frame()

stats_univar = adonis2(ps_unifrac ~ antidepressant_on_off, data = metadata2)

stats = bind_rows('Univariate' = stats_univar %>% as.data.frame() %>% 
                    rownames_to_column('Variable'),
                  .id = 'Model')

stats = stats %>% rename(Pval = `Pr(>F)`) %>%
  filter(!is.na(Pval))

stats
```
